(DEVICE FILE: CON7_1_SD_13N2_16R1X15_TFCARD - used for device: 'CON7_1_SD_13N2_16R1X15_TF CARD')

PACKAGE SD_13N2_16R1X15
CLASS IC
PINCOUNT 13

PINORDER 'CON7_1_SD_13N2_16R1X15_TF CARD' CD/DAT3 CLK CMD DAT0 DAT1 DAT2 DET GND1 GND2 GND3 GND4 VDD,
      VSS2
FUNCTION G1 'CON7_1_SD_13N2_16R1X15_TF CARD' 2 5 3 7 8 1 9 10 11 12 G 4 6

PACKAGEPROP PART_NAME CON7_1
PACKAGEPROP VALUE 'TF CARD'

END
